message:
Fix Go backend issues: delete workload, error handling, race conditions (#4408)

- #4381: Remove unnecessary fmt.Sprintf calls in pkg/agent
- #4385: Fix DeleteWorkload no-op — implement actual resource deletion
- #4386: Distinguish CRD-not-found from real errors in ArgoCD listing
- #4387: Only create on 404, not on any GET failure in dependency apply
- #4389: Use apierrors.IsAlreadyExists instead of string matching
- #4396: Add confirmation requirement for destructive kubectl commands

Fixes #4381, #4385, #4386, #4387, #4389, #4396

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
